-            "ANTHROPIC_ACCESS_TOKEN",
-            "ANTHROPIC_BETA_HEADER",
-            "ANTHROPIC_REFRESH_TOKEN",

-        ]

+                "ANTHROPIC_ACCESS_TOKEN",
+                "ANTHROPIC_BETA_HEADER",
+                "ANTHROPIC_REFRESH_TOKEN",

         case .grok: ["X_AI_API_KEY", "XAI_API_KEY", "GROK_API_KEY"]
         case .gemini: ["GEMINI_API_KEY"]
         }
